records.m_SubTitle_ENG: A few days ago, Lotus, Amani Valley.
records.m_SubTitle_DEU: A few days ago, Lotus, Amani Valley.
records.m_SubTitle_FRA: A few days ago, Lotus, Amani Valley.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... It smells so good...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... It smells so good...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... It smells so good...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll get reported if I ask for a pack, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll get reported if I ask for a pack, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll get reported if I ask for a pack, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Maybe I should cut off an arm? Won't they give me a blood transfusion if I pretend to be an emergency patient?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Maybe I should cut off an arm? Won't they give me a blood transfusion if I pretend to be an emergency patient?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Maybe I should cut off an arm? Won't they give me a blood transfusion if I pretend to be an emergency patient?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was wondering what you were up to avoiding the guards' eyes, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was wondering what you were up to avoiding the guards' eyes, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was wondering what you were up to avoiding the guards' eyes, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't expect you to be hiding on the side of the road, plotting to hurt yourself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't expect you to be hiding on the side of the road, plotting to hurt yourself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't expect you to be hiding on the side of the road, plotting to hurt yourself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?! The Administration gangster...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?! The Administration gangster...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?! The Administration gangster...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am not a gangster.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am not a gangster.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am not a gangster.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Liar! You beat me up like a pi95ata when we first met!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Liar! You beat me up like a pi95ata when we first met!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Liar! You beat me up like a pi95ata when we first met!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you talking about the Senior convention meeting?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you talking about the Senior convention meeting?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you talking about the Senior convention meeting?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I only stopped you because you showed your teeth and tried to bite the back of a female employee's neck.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I only stopped you because you showed your teeth and tried to bite the back of a female employee's neck.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I only stopped you because you showed your teeth and tried to bite the back of a female employee's neck.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At the time, I thought you were just a pervert, but... now that I think back on it, you were trying to suck on her blood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At the time, I thought you were just a pervert, but... now that I think back on it, you were trying to suck on her blood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At the time, I thought you were just a pervert, but... now that I think back on it, you were trying to suck on her blood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-it's because I lost my mask back then!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-it's because I lost my mask back then!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-it's because I lost my mask back then!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The smell made me a little dizzy, but I didn't bite!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The smell made me a little dizzy, but I didn't bite!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The smell made me a little dizzy, but I didn't bite!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can't you satiate yourself with animal blood?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can't you satiate yourself with animal blood?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can't you satiate yourself with animal blood?

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* Nope. Do you think I'm an animal or something?
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* Nope. Do you think I'm an animal or something?
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* Nope. Do you think I'm an animal or something?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're not less of an animal to be seeking human blood, though.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're not less of an animal to be seeking human blood, though.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're not less of an animal to be seeking human blood, though.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Follow me. There should be some emergency blood packs stored in the Senior's office.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Follow me. There should be some emergency blood packs stored in the Senior's office.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Follow me. There should be some emergency blood packs stored in the Senior's office.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Really? Awesome!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Really? Awesome!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Really? Awesome!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But didn't you come to find and punish me? I thought you were throwing me in jail.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But didn't you come to find and punish me? I thought you were throwing me in jail.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But didn't you come to find and punish me? I thought you were throwing me in jail.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That won't be happening, at least, not right now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That won't be happening, at least, not right now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That won't be happening, at least, not right now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seriously? Then, I'm free?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seriously? Then, I'm free?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seriously? Then, I'm free?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're not even going to... torture me for the truth?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're not even going to... torture me for the truth?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're not even going to... torture me for the truth?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know what you are expecting, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know what you are expecting, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know what you are expecting, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your disposition has only been temporarily postponed. Because the key person who can prove your crime is missing at the moment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your disposition has only been temporarily postponed. Because the key person who can prove your crime is missing at the moment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your disposition has only been temporarily postponed. Because the key person who can prove your crime is missing at the moment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also, the Administration has decided that you will be of help in searching for the missing Senior.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also, the Administration has decided that you will be of help in searching for the missing Senior.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also, the Administration has decided that you will be of help in searching for the missing Senior.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Only if you don't randomly disappear like you did today, that is.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Only if you don't randomly disappear like you did today, that is.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Only if you don't randomly disappear like you did today, that is.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay! If we can find Mr. Jackson, then I'm all in!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay! If we can find Mr. Jackson, then I'm all in!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay! If we can find Mr. Jackson, then I'm all in!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...That's what you said, and I believed you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...That's what you said, and I believed you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...That's what you said, and I believed you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You tricked me! I'm the one who sucks blood, not the other way around!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You tricked me! I'm the one who sucks blood, not the other way around!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You tricked me! I'm the one who sucks blood, not the other way around!

records.m_Talk_ENG: My precious blood! Give it back right now!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: My precious blood! Give it back right now!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: My precious blood! Give it back right now!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Calm down. This is part of finding Mr. Jackson.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Calm down. This is part of finding Mr. Jackson.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Calm down. This is part of finding Mr. Jackson.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your vampiric impulse is an acquired factor from the Northern Union's surgery, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your vampiric impulse is an acquired factor from the Northern Union's surgery, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your vampiric impulse is an acquired factor from the Northern Union's surgery, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you can sense where someone you fed on is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you can sense where someone you fed on is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you can sense where someone you fed on is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then if we grasp the mechanism, we can use blood to roughly pinpoint Mr. Jackson's location.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then if we grasp the mechanism, we can use blood to roughly pinpoint Mr. Jackson's location.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then if we grasp the mechanism, we can use blood to roughly pinpoint Mr. Jackson's location.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Senior rarely gets motivated. Cooperate quietly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Senior rarely gets motivated. Cooperate quietly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Senior rarely gets motivated. Cooperate quietly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey...! I have been working pretty hard lately, okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey...! I have been working pretty hard lately, okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey...! I have been working pretty hard lately, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh... So, did you learn anything?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh... So, did you learn anything?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh... So, did you learn anything?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry. Not exactly my specialty.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry. Not exactly my specialty.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry. Not exactly my specialty.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Graaah...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Graaah...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Graaah...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let go of me... you Administration gangster!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let go of me... you Administration gangster!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let go of me... you Administration gangster!

records.m_Talk_ENG: My apologies. The Senior has a sunlight deficiency, so drawing blood at the nape would be risky.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My apologies. The Senior has a sunlight deficiency, so drawing blood at the nape would be risky.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My apologies. The Senior has a sunlight deficiency, so drawing blood at the nape would be risky.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then my blood...! My precious blood is wasted. My blooood...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then my blood...! My precious blood is wasted. My blooood...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then my blood...! My precious blood is wasted. My blooood...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I-is she always this violent?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I-is she always this violent?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I-is she always this violent?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Looks like her reason is numbed by a persistent thirst.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Looks like her reason is numbed by a persistent thirst.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Looks like her reason is numbed by a persistent thirst.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Put her back in the donation room.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Put her back in the donation room.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Put her back in the donation room.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Give her a blood pack so she does not get rough.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Give her a blood pack so she does not get rough.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Give her a blood pack so she does not get rough.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Understood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Understood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Understood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: L-let go of me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: L-let go of me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: L-let go of me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You heartless Lotus thugs...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You heartless Lotus thugs...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You heartless Lotus thugs...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hngh. I feel almost as woozy as I did back in the lab.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hngh. I feel almost as woozy as I did back in the lab.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hngh. I feel almost as woozy as I did back in the lab.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe I should slip out when I get a chance...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe I should slip out when I get a chance...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe I should slip out when I get a chance...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Shirokova? Do you have a moment?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Shirokova? Do you have a moment?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Shirokova? Do you have a moment?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kyaaah...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kyaaah...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kyaaah...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We are not here to draw blood. Please calm down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We are not here to draw blood. Please calm down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We are not here to draw blood. Please calm down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A friend has come to see you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A friend has come to see you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A friend has come to see you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A friend?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A friend?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A friend?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's odd. The only one who ever visits me is the Administrator.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's odd. The only one who ever visits me is the Administrator.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's odd. The only one who ever visits me is the Administrator.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And if it were him, he would have gotten past the hermit Senior and the gangster. Hmm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And if it were him, he would have gotten past the hermit Senior and the gangster. Hmm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And if it were him, he would have gotten past the hermit Senior and the gangster. Hmm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um... your friend said you would know if I handed you this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um... your friend said you would know if I handed you this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um... your friend said you would know if I handed you this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Arf.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Arf.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Arf.

records.m_Talk_ENG: F-Fluffox. Nothing bad on the way over, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: F-Fluffox. Nothing bad on the way over, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: F-Fluffox. Nothing bad on the way over, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Arf.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Arf.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Arf.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe. Good job, good job.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe. Good job, good job.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe. Good job, good job.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey. You are with the Northern Union, right? I remember you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey. You are with the Northern Union, right? I remember you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey. You are with the Northern Union, right? I remember you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Never mind how you got in here. What business does a Northern Union person have with me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Never mind how you got in here. What business does a Northern Union person have with me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Never mind how you got in here. What business does a Northern Union person have with me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: M-Ms. Yulia told me to find you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: M-Ms. Yulia told me to find you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: M-Ms. Yulia told me to find you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She said you are essential to this mission and that I should ask for your help.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She said you are essential to this mission and that I should ask for your help.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She said you are essential to this mission and that I should ask for your help.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...*Sigh* That creepy woman. She thinks a couple favors means I'll wear her leash like a flunky.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...*Sigh* That creepy woman. She thinks a couple favors means I'll wear her leash like a flunky.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...*Sigh* That creepy woman. She thinks a couple favors means I'll wear her leash like a flunky.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry, I refuse. I only worked with Felix because of Mr. Jackson.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry, I refuse. I only worked with Felix because of Mr. Jackson.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry, I refuse. I only worked with Felix because of Mr. Jackson.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We were butting heads with the Northern Union just the other day. What nerve to hold out a hand to me now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We were butting heads with the Northern Union just the other day. What nerve to hold out a hand to me now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We were butting heads with the Northern Union just the other day. What nerve to hold out a hand to me now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uh... That won't do.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uh... That won't do.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uh... That won't do.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-it is an assignment from Ms. Yulia. I have to succeed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-it is an assignment from Ms. Yulia. I have to succeed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-it is an assignment from Ms. Yulia. I have to succeed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Arf.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Arf.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Arf.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah... right! I haven't given you this yet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah... right! I haven't given you this yet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah... right! I haven't given you this yet.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Whatever you say, my answer is the same. I won't help the Northern Union┬Ψ
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Whatever you say, my answer is the same. I won't help the Northern Union┬Ψ
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Whatever you say, my answer is the same. I won't help the Northern Union┬Ψ
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Arf.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Arf.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Arf.

records.m_Talk_ENG: F-Fluffox...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: F-Fluffox...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: F-Fluffox...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What the...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What the...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What the...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How do you have Mr. Jackson's Senior Code?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: How do you have Mr. Jackson's Senior Code?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: How do you have Mr. Jackson's Senior Code?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't tell me the Northern Union did something to him...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't tell me the Northern Union did something to him...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't tell me the Northern Union did something to him...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: N-no. Mr. Jackson gave that to Ms. Yulia.
records.m_Talk_DEU: N-no. Mr. Jackson gave that to Ms. Yulia.
records.m_Talk_FRA: N-no. Mr. Jackson gave that to Ms. Yulia.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So please, let Fluffox go...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So please, let Fluffox go...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So please, let Fluffox go...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: F-Fluffooox...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: F-Fluffooox...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: F-Fluffooox...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Arf.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Arf.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Arf.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I still don't trust you. And I still have no intention of helping the Northern Union until my doubts are cleared.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I still don't trust you. And I still have no intention of helping the Northern Union until my doubts are cleared.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I still don't trust you. And I still have no intention of helping the Northern Union until my doubts are cleared.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why would Mr. Jackson hand his Senior Code to Felix?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why would Mr. Jackson hand his Senior Code to Felix?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why would Mr. Jackson hand his Senior Code to Felix?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And why was he headed into Northern Union territory in the first place before he disappeared?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And why was he headed into Northern Union territory in the first place before he disappeared?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And why was he headed into Northern Union territory in the first place before he disappeared?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I don't know that either.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I don't know that either.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I don't know that either.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But...

records.m_Talk_ENG: M-Ms. Yulia said the answers you want are inside this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: M-Ms. Yulia said the answers you want are inside this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: M-Ms. Yulia said the answers you want are inside this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Understood, Yanikka.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Understood, Yanikka.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Understood, Yanikka.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever <color=#ffd34c>choice</color> you make after this, I'll respect it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever <color=#ffd34c>choice</color> you make after this, I'll respect it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever <color=#ffd34c>choice</color> you make after this, I'll respect it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Back then, I wondered why he said that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Back then, I wondered why he said that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Back then, I wondered why he said that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe Mr. Jackson knew from the start it would come to this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe Mr. Jackson knew from the start it would come to this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe Mr. Jackson knew from the start it would come to this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: U-um...
records.m_Talk_DEU: U-um...
records.m_Talk_FRA: U-um...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. Unlike the Northern Union, I keep business and personal separate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. Unlike the Northern Union, I keep business and personal separate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. Unlike the Northern Union, I keep business and personal separate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Senior Administrator Jackson confirmed.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Senior Administrator Jackson confirmed.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Senior Administrator Jackson confirmed.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Access from the registered terminal approved.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Access from the registered terminal approved.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Access from the registered terminal approved.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: If the crisis Mr. Jackson spoke of is coming to Chamber...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If the crisis Mr. Jackson spoke of is coming to Chamber...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If the crisis Mr. Jackson spoke of is coming to Chamber...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then fine. As lousy as it feels, I'll dance on the stage that woman set.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then fine. As lousy as it feels, I'll dance on the stage that woman set.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then fine. As lousy as it feels, I'll dance on the stage that woman set.

root.m_SubTitle_ENG: A few days ago, Lotus, Amani Valley.
root.m_SubTitle_DEU: A few days ago, Lotus, Amani Valley.
root.m_SubTitle_FRA: A few days ago, Lotus, Amani Valley.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... It smells so good...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... It smells so good...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... It smells so good...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll get reported if I ask for a pack, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll get reported if I ask for a pack, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll get reported if I ask for a pack, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Maybe I should cut off an arm? Won't they give me a blood transfusion if I pretend to be an emergency patient?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Maybe I should cut off an arm? Won't they give me a blood transfusion if I pretend to be an emergency patient?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Maybe I should cut off an arm? Won't they give me a blood transfusion if I pretend to be an emergency patient?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I was wondering what you were up to avoiding the guards' eyes, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I was wondering what you were up to avoiding the guards' eyes, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I was wondering what you were up to avoiding the guards' eyes, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't expect you to be hiding on the side of the road, plotting to hurt yourself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't expect you to be hiding on the side of the road, plotting to hurt yourself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't expect you to be hiding on the side of the road, plotting to hurt yourself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?! The Administration gangster...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?! The Administration gangster...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?! The Administration gangster...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I am not a gangster.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I am not a gangster.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I am not a gangster.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Liar! You beat me up like a pi95ata when we first met!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Liar! You beat me up like a pi95ata when we first met!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Liar! You beat me up like a pi95ata when we first met!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you talking about the Senior convention meeting?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you talking about the Senior convention meeting?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you talking about the Senior convention meeting?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I only stopped you because you showed your teeth and tried to bite the back of a female employee's neck.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I only stopped you because you showed your teeth and tried to bite the back of a female employee's neck.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I only stopped you because you showed your teeth and tried to bite the back of a female employee's neck.

root.m_Talk_ENG: At the time, I thought you were just a pervert, but... now that I think back on it, you were trying to suck on her blood.
root.m_Talk_DEU: At the time, I thought you were just a pervert, but... now that I think back on it, you were trying to suck on her blood.
root.m_Talk_FRA: At the time, I thought you were just a pervert, but... now that I think back on it, you were trying to suck on her blood.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-it's because I lost my mask back then!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-it's because I lost my mask back then!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-it's because I lost my mask back then!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The smell made me a little dizzy, but I didn't bite!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The smell made me a little dizzy, but I didn't bite!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The smell made me a little dizzy, but I didn't bite!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Can't you satiate yourself with animal blood?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Can't you satiate yourself with animal blood?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Can't you satiate yourself with animal blood?

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* Nope. Do you think I'm an animal or something?
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* Nope. Do you think I'm an animal or something?
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* Nope. Do you think I'm an animal or something?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're not less of an animal to be seeking human blood, though.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're not less of an animal to be seeking human blood, though.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're not less of an animal to be seeking human blood, though.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Follow me. There should be some emergency blood packs stored in the Senior's office.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Follow me. There should be some emergency blood packs stored in the Senior's office.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Follow me. There should be some emergency blood packs stored in the Senior's office.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Really? Awesome!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Really? Awesome!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Really? Awesome!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But didn't you come to find and punish me? I thought you were throwing me in jail.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But didn't you come to find and punish me? I thought you were throwing me in jail.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But didn't you come to find and punish me? I thought you were throwing me in jail.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That won't be happening, at least, not right now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That won't be happening, at least, not right now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That won't be happening, at least, not right now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Seriously? Then, I'm free?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Seriously? Then, I'm free?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Seriously? Then, I'm free?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're not even going to... torture me for the truth?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're not even going to... torture me for the truth?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're not even going to... torture me for the truth?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know what you are expecting, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know what you are expecting, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know what you are expecting, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Your disposition has only been temporarily postponed. Because the key person who can prove your crime is missing at the moment.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Your disposition has only been temporarily postponed. Because the key person who can prove your crime is missing at the moment.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Your disposition has only been temporarily postponed. Because the key person who can prove your crime is missing at the moment.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Also, the Administration has decided that you will be of help in searching for the missing Senior.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Also, the Administration has decided that you will be of help in searching for the missing Senior.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Also, the Administration has decided that you will be of help in searching for the missing Senior.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Only if you don't randomly disappear like you did today, that is.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Only if you don't randomly disappear like you did today, that is.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Only if you don't randomly disappear like you did today, that is.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay! If we can find Mr. Jackson, then I'm all in!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay! If we can find Mr. Jackson, then I'm all in!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay! If we can find Mr. Jackson, then I'm all in!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...That's what you said, and I believed you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...That's what you said, and I believed you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...That's what you said, and I believed you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You tricked me! I'm the one who sucks blood, not the other way around!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You tricked me! I'm the one who sucks blood, not the other way around!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You tricked me! I'm the one who sucks blood, not the other way around!

root.m_Talk_ENG: My precious blood! Give it back right now!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: My precious blood! Give it back right now!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: My precious blood! Give it back right now!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Calm down. This is part of finding Mr. Jackson.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Calm down. This is part of finding Mr. Jackson.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Calm down. This is part of finding Mr. Jackson.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Your vampiric impulse is an acquired factor from the Northern Union's surgery, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Your vampiric impulse is an acquired factor from the Northern Union's surgery, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Your vampiric impulse is an acquired factor from the Northern Union's surgery, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you can sense where someone you fed on is...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you can sense where someone you fed on is...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you can sense where someone you fed on is...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then if we grasp the mechanism, we can use blood to roughly pinpoint Mr. Jackson's location.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then if we grasp the mechanism, we can use blood to roughly pinpoint Mr. Jackson's location.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then if we grasp the mechanism, we can use blood to roughly pinpoint Mr. Jackson's location.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Senior rarely gets motivated. Cooperate quietly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Senior rarely gets motivated. Cooperate quietly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Senior rarely gets motivated. Cooperate quietly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey...! I have been working pretty hard lately, okay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey...! I have been working pretty hard lately, okay?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey...! I have been working pretty hard lately, okay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh... So, did you learn anything?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh... So, did you learn anything?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh... So, did you learn anything?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry. Not exactly my specialty.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry. Not exactly my specialty.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry. Not exactly my specialty.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Graaah...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Graaah...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Graaah...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let go of me... you Administration gangster!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let go of me... you Administration gangster!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let go of me... you Administration gangster!

root.m_Talk_ENG: My apologies. The Senior has a sunlight deficiency, so drawing blood at the nape would be risky.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My apologies. The Senior has a sunlight deficiency, so drawing blood at the nape would be risky.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My apologies. The Senior has a sunlight deficiency, so drawing blood at the nape would be risky.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then my blood...! My precious blood is wasted. My blooood...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then my blood...! My precious blood is wasted. My blooood...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then my blood...! My precious blood is wasted. My blooood...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I-is she always this violent?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I-is she always this violent?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I-is she always this violent?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Looks like her reason is numbed by a persistent thirst.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Looks like her reason is numbed by a persistent thirst.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Looks like her reason is numbed by a persistent thirst.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Put her back in the donation room.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Put her back in the donation room.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Put her back in the donation room.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Give her a blood pack so she does not get rough.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Give her a blood pack so she does not get rough.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Give her a blood pack so she does not get rough.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Understood.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Understood.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Understood.

root.m_Talk_ENG: L-let go of me!
root.m_Talk_DEU: L-let go of me!
root.m_Talk_FRA: L-let go of me!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You heartless Lotus thugs...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You heartless Lotus thugs...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You heartless Lotus thugs...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hngh. I feel almost as woozy as I did back in the lab.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hngh. I feel almost as woozy as I did back in the lab.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hngh. I feel almost as woozy as I did back in the lab.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe I should slip out when I get a chance...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe I should slip out when I get a chance...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe I should slip out when I get a chance...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Shirokova? Do you have a moment?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Shirokova? Do you have a moment?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Shirokova? Do you have a moment?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kyaaah...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kyaaah...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kyaaah...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We are not here to draw blood. Please calm down.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We are not here to draw blood. Please calm down.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We are not here to draw blood. Please calm down.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A friend has come to see you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A friend has come to see you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A friend has come to see you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A friend?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A friend?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A friend?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's odd. The only one who ever visits me is the Administrator.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's odd. The only one who ever visits me is the Administrator.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's odd. The only one who ever visits me is the Administrator.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And if it were him, he would have gotten past the hermit Senior and the gangster. Hmm...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And if it were him, he would have gotten past the hermit Senior and the gangster. Hmm...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And if it were him, he would have gotten past the hermit Senior and the gangster. Hmm...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Um... your friend said you would know if I handed you this?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Um... your friend said you would know if I handed you this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Um... your friend said you would know if I handed you this?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What is this?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What is this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What is this?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Arf.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Arf.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Arf.

root.m_Talk_ENG: F-Fluffox. Nothing bad on the way over, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: F-Fluffox. Nothing bad on the way over, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: F-Fluffox. Nothing bad on the way over, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Arf.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Arf.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Arf.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe. Good job, good job.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe. Good job, good job.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe. Good job, good job.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey. You are with the Northern Union, right? I remember you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey. You are with the Northern Union, right? I remember you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey. You are with the Northern Union, right? I remember you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Never mind how you got in here. What business does a Northern Union person have with me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Never mind how you got in here. What business does a Northern Union person have with me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Never mind how you got in here. What business does a Northern Union person have with me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: M-Ms. Yulia told me to find you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: M-Ms. Yulia told me to find you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: M-Ms. Yulia told me to find you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She said you are essential to this mission and that I should ask for your help.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She said you are essential to this mission and that I should ask for your help.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She said you are essential to this mission and that I should ask for your help.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...*Sigh* That creepy woman. She thinks a couple favors means I'll wear her leash like a flunky.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...*Sigh* That creepy woman. She thinks a couple favors means I'll wear her leash like a flunky.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...*Sigh* That creepy woman. She thinks a couple favors means I'll wear her leash like a flunky.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry, I refuse. I only worked with Felix because of Mr. Jackson.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry, I refuse. I only worked with Felix because of Mr. Jackson.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry, I refuse. I only worked with Felix because of Mr. Jackson.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We were butting heads with the Northern Union just the other day. What nerve to hold out a hand to me now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We were butting heads with the Northern Union just the other day. What nerve to hold out a hand to me now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We were butting heads with the Northern Union just the other day. What nerve to hold out a hand to me now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Uh... That won't do.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Uh... That won't do.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Uh... That won't do.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-it is an assignment from Ms. Yulia. I have to succeed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-it is an assignment from Ms. Yulia. I have to succeed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-it is an assignment from Ms. Yulia. I have to succeed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Arf.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Arf.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Arf.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah... right! I haven't given you this yet.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah... right! I haven't given you this yet.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah... right! I haven't given you this yet.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Whatever you say, my answer is the same. I won't help the Northern Union┬Ψ
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Whatever you say, my answer is the same. I won't help the Northern Union┬Ψ
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Whatever you say, my answer is the same. I won't help the Northern Union┬Ψ
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Arf.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Arf.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Arf.

root.m_Talk_ENG: F-Fluffox...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: F-Fluffox...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: F-Fluffox...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What the...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What the...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What the...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: How do you have Mr. Jackson's Senior Code?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: How do you have Mr. Jackson's Senior Code?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: How do you have Mr. Jackson's Senior Code?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't tell me the Northern Union did something to him...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't tell me the Northern Union did something to him...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't tell me the Northern Union did something to him...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: N-no. Mr. Jackson gave that to Ms. Yulia.
root.m_Talk_DEU: N-no. Mr. Jackson gave that to Ms. Yulia.
root.m_Talk_FRA: N-no. Mr. Jackson gave that to Ms. Yulia.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So please, let Fluffox go...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: So please, let Fluffox go...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: So please, let Fluffox go...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: F-Fluffooox...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: F-Fluffooox...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: F-Fluffooox...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Arf.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Arf.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Arf.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I still don't trust you. And I still have no intention of helping the Northern Union until my doubts are cleared.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I still don't trust you. And I still have no intention of helping the Northern Union until my doubts are cleared.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I still don't trust you. And I still have no intention of helping the Northern Union until my doubts are cleared.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why would Mr. Jackson hand his Senior Code to Felix?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why would Mr. Jackson hand his Senior Code to Felix?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why would Mr. Jackson hand his Senior Code to Felix?

root.m_Talk_ENG: And why was he headed into Northern Union territory in the first place before he disappeared?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And why was he headed into Northern Union territory in the first place before he disappeared?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And why was he headed into Northern Union territory in the first place before he disappeared?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-I don't know that either.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-I don't know that either.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-I don't know that either.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But...

root.m_Talk_ENG: M-Ms. Yulia said the answers you want are inside this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: M-Ms. Yulia said the answers you want are inside this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: M-Ms. Yulia said the answers you want are inside this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Understood, Yanikka.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Understood, Yanikka.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Understood, Yanikka.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever <color=#ffd34c>choice</color> you make after this, I'll respect it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever <color=#ffd34c>choice</color> you make after this, I'll respect it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever <color=#ffd34c>choice</color> you make after this, I'll respect it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Back then, I wondered why he said that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Back then, I wondered why he said that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Back then, I wondered why he said that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe Mr. Jackson knew from the start it would come to this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe Mr. Jackson knew from the start it would come to this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe Mr. Jackson knew from the start it would come to this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: U-um...
root.m_Talk_DEU: U-um...
root.m_Talk_FRA: U-um...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. Unlike the Northern Union, I keep business and personal separate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. Unlike the Northern Union, I keep business and personal separate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. Unlike the Northern Union, I keep business and personal separate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Senior Administrator Jackson confirmed.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Senior Administrator Jackson confirmed.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Senior Administrator Jackson confirmed.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Access from the registered terminal approved.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Access from the registered terminal approved.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Access from the registered terminal approved.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: If the crisis Mr. Jackson spoke of is coming to Chamber...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If the crisis Mr. Jackson spoke of is coming to Chamber...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If the crisis Mr. Jackson spoke of is coming to Chamber...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then fine. As lousy as it feels, I'll dance on the stage that woman set.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then fine. As lousy as it feels, I'll dance on the stage that woman set.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then fine. As lousy as it feels, I'll dance on the stage that woman set.
